name: swap_partitioned_tables
description: Atomic table swap: drop old FKs, rename old sequences to _old, rename old tables to _old, rename new sequences to production names, rename new tables to production names, rename indexes and FK constraints to match
query: ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_annotations DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_annotations_prow_job_run_id; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_runs_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_runs_old_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_annotations_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_annotations_old_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_old_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_runs RENAME TO prow_job_runs_old; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_annotations RENAME TO prow_job_run_annotations_old; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests RENAME TO prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_old; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_old; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_old; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_runs_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_runs_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_annotations_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_annotations_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_runs_new RENAME TO prow_job_runs; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_annotations_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_annotations; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs_new RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_runs_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_runs_old_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_runs_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_runs_old_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_runs_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_runs_old_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_annotations_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_annotations_old_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_annotations_key RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_annotations_old_key; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_old_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_prow_pull_request_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_old_prow_pull_request_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_runs_new_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_runs_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_runs_new_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_runs_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_runs_new_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_runs_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_annotations_new_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_annotations_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_annotations_new_key RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_annotations_key; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_new_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_new_prow_pull_request_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_prow_pull_request_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_status; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id; DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'fk_prow_job_runs_prow_job_id') THEN EXECUTE 'ALTER TABLE prow_job_runs_old RENAME CONSTRAINT fk_prow_job_runs_prow_job_id TO fk_prow_job_runs_old_prow_job_id'; END IF; END $$; ALTER TABLE prow_job_runs RENAME CONSTRAINT fk_prow_job_runs_new_prow_job_id TO fk_prow_job_runs_prow_job_id;
